overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a samurai action game depicting a character wearing a traditional straw cloak exploring the interior of a Japanese wooden building. The scene features warm lantern lighting, red curtains, and a central hearth with an NPC villager tending to a fire.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden corridor with paper lanterns and red curtains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit wooden corridor toward green-lit windows at the far end

entered.detail: round illuminated paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling on both sides
red fabric curtains (noren) hanging in doorways along the corridor sides
traditional shoji screens emitting green light at the end of the corridor
polished wooden floorboards running the length of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow wooden corridor illuminated by warm paper lanterns. Red curtains hang in doorways on both sides, and green-lit shoji windows are visible at the far end of the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: main room with central stone hearth and hanging dried goods

events.description: passes through red curtains into the main room revealing a stone hearth with fire
NPC villager comes into view standing near the fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking into the main room and approaching the central hearth area where an NPC stands

notable_agents.action: villager in traditional clothing standing near the hearth, turns to look at the player character

entered.detail: square stone fireplace with burning fire and cooking implements
strings of dried vegetables or fish hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a larger room centered around a stone hearth with a burning fire. Dried goods hang from the ceiling beams, and an NPC villager stands near the fireplace, turning to observe the player. The green shoji windows are now behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage area with wooden shelves and pottery

events.description: character turns left and walks toward the back storage shelves
character turns around to head back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past the hearth to examine the back area with shelves, then turning to return

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving units holding pottery and storage jars
low wooden table or counter covered with a white cloth

segments.scene_description: The character explores the back portion of the room, passing wooden shelves filled with pottery and a covered counter. The stone hearth recedes to the left background as the character moves deeper, then turns around to head back.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through the main room toward the curtained corridor

events.description: character walks back toward the entrance passing the hearth again

agents.ego_description: walking back through the main room toward the curtained corridor, passing the NPC near the fire

notable_agents.action: villager remains near the fireplace as the player walks past on the return path

entered.detail: stone fireplace now visible again on the right side when returning

segments.scene_description: The character returns through the main room, passing the stone hearth and the NPC villager once more. The red curtains of the entrance corridor come back into view ahead as the character approaches the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, lantern-lit corridor that opens into a spacious communal room before returning to the entrance. It begins by following the character through a wooden hallway lined with red curtains and illuminated by warm paper lanterns, moving toward green-lit shoji windows in the distance. As the character emerges from the corridor, the space expands into a large room centered around a burning stone hearth where a villager stands among hanging dried goods. The camera then pushes deeper into the back of the room, passing pottery-filled shelves and a covered counter, before turning around to retrace its steps. Finally, the scene shifts back across the main hearth and past the villager as the red curtains of the entrance corridor reappear ahead.
